sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (value Decimal32(4)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
INSERT INTO test_decimal (value) VALUES (toDecimal32(100.1234, 4), toDecimal32(111.9999, 4), toDecimal32(1000.0001, 4);
UPDATE test_decimal SET value = toDecimal32(10000.1234, 4) WHERE isDecimalOverflow(value, 4) = 1;
SELECT value, isDecimalOverflow(value) FROM test_decimal WHERE value < toDecimal32(2000, 4);
